title: aspidium filix-mas var. heleopteris
intro: Aspidium filix-mas var. heleopteris, also known as the Lady Fern, is a type of fern plant characterized by its delicate fronds and slender stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The Lady Fern is also believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever and promoting relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the Lady Fern can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
